prompt: So it does not hammer storage on every diagnostic line, this backend accumulates emitted records and flushes them in groups on a size or time trigger. Where is the record type that carries one emitted entry's fields, and where is the accumulate-and-flush machinery that batches them before they are persisted?

rubric.answer_shape: one entry type, one batching handler

evidence.claim: accumulates and flushes entries in groups

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
